scripts.caprover:deploy-api: cp captain-definition-api /tmp/captain-definition && tar -czf /tmp/ubimate-api.tar.gz -C /tmp captain-definition -C $PWD Dockerfile.api packages apps pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml package.json && rm /tmp/captain-definition && caprover deploy -a ubimate-api -t /tmp/ubimate-api.tar.gz
scripts.caprover:deploy-app: cp captain-definition-unified /tmp/captain-definition && tar -czf /tmp/ubimate-app.tar.gz --exclude node_modules --exclude data --exclude dist --exclude test-results --exclude playwright-report --exclude playwright-report-live --exclude .env --exclude 'apps/web/public/drawio' -C /tmp captain-definition -C $PWD Dockerfile.unified packages apps/api apps/web apps/admin scripts pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml package.json && rm /tmp/captain-definition && caprover deploy -a ubimate-app -t /tmp/ubimate-app.tar.gz
scripts.caprover:deploy-com: pnpm --filter com build && cp captain-definition-com /tmp/captain-definition && tar -czf /tmp/ubimate-com.tar.gz -C /tmp captain-definition -C $PWD/sites/com . && rm /tmp/captain-definition && caprover deploy -a ubimate-com -t /tmp/ubimate-com.tar.gz
